title: Reactify
body:
> Reactify - A core library for [Brutal Nightmare](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare)
---
**Features**
+ Fix bugs about loot-table in BrutalNightmare-`V4+`
+ Fix incompatiblities 
+ Optimize for `delay-function-algorithm`,`low-tick-events-v0` and `random`-`prandom` functions in FokusAPI-`V2+`
---
**Support**
+ Support Mod(NeoForge,Forge,Fabric,Quilt) , Datapack, Plugin (Paper,Spigot,Purpur,Bukkit)
+ Minecraft Versions : 1.16-> up
---
**Incompatibilites**
+ None
